details: The agent ran appropriate gh commands to list failed runs and view job details for each. It correctly reported all 5 distinct failed runs with their run IDs, workflow names, and specific failed job names. The job assignments appear correct based on the command outputs shown in the trajectory (note: the output for runs 23385977677 and 23385802450/23385741225 appear interleaved in the trajectory, but the agent correctly attributed the 14-job failure to run 23385977677 and single 'check' failures to the later runs). All required information was present and complete.
